allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/training.json'\); console.log\('rows:', d.rowCount\); d.rows.forEach\(\(r,i\)=>{const c=r.map\(x=>x.trim\(\)\).filter\(Boolean\); if\(c.length\) console.log\(i, JSON.stringify\(c\).slice\(0,200\)\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./training-raw.json'\); console.log\('rows:', d.rowCount\); d.rows.forEach\(\(r,i\)=>{const c=r.map\(x=>x.trim\(\)\); const nonEmpty=c.filter\(Boolean\); if\(nonEmpty.length\) console.log\(i+':', JSON.stringify\(c\)\);}\);")
